allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d.get\('message'\) or f'{d[\\"totalChanged\\"]} changes, sample: {d[\\"changes\\"][0] if d[\\"changes\\"] else None}'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'price: {d.get\(\\"currentPrice\\"\)}, vwap: {d.get\(\\"currentVWAP\\"\)}, dev: {d.get\(\\"deviationPct\\"\)}%'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('quotes OK:', list\(d.get\('data',{}\).keys\(\)\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('chart OK, bars:', len\(d.get\('close',[]\)\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('options:', 'calls' in d, 'error' in d, d.get\('error',''\)[:60]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('calls:', len\(d.get\('calls',[]\)\), 'puts:', len\(d.get\('puts',[]\)\), 'price:', d.get\('underlyingPrice'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('scan results:', d.get\('count'\), d.get\('results',[{}]\)[0].get\('signal'\) if d.get\('results'\) else 'empty'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f\\"  {r['symbol']}: {r['signal']} score={r['score']}\\"\) for r in d.get\('results',[]\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f\\"  calls={len\(d.get\('calls',[]\)\)}, puts={len\(d.get\('puts',[]\)\)}, source={d.get\('source'\)}\\"\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f\\"  {k}: \\${v['regularMarketPrice']:.2f} {v['regularMarketChangePercent']:+.2f}%\\"\) for k,v in d.get\('data',{}\).items\(\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); g=d['gainers'][0] if d.get\('gainers'\) else {}; print\(f\\"  {g.get\('symbol'\)}: price=\\${g.get\('regularMarketPrice'\)} chg={g.get\('regularMarketChangePercent'\)}% vol={g.get\('regularMarketVolume'\)}\\"\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); r=d['results'][0] if d.get\('results'\) else {}; print\(f\\"  {r.get\('symbol'\)}: price=\\${r.get\('price'\)} chg={r.get\('change_pct'\)}% vol={r.get\('volume'\)}\\"\)")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) for r in d.get\('results',[]\): print\(f\\" {r['symbol']}: \\${r['price']} {r.get\('change_pct',0\):+.2f}% vol={r.get\('volume',0\):,} signal={r['signal']}\\"\) " echo "--- Movers ---" curl -s "http://localhost:8000/api/movers?limit=2")
